title: US Consumer Slowdown Threatens Stocks Rally, UBS Says
summary: Bhanu Baweja, chief investment strategist at UBS Investment Bank, tells Bloomberg Television that the equity markets rally is at risk from a slowdown in consumer spending as real disposable income growth nears zero and fiscal support fades. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Value Stocks With Earnings Strength Post 3,500% Run Since 2000
summary: Turns out, loading up on technology giants isn’t the only route to better returns. Value companies, too, stand a decent chance of trouncing the market — as long as several conditions are met.
